nodes.name: Schedule Trigger (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED — do not turn on until (1) VAPI_API_KEY is in .env, (2) Vapi n8n credential is created, (3) the Vapi Assistant is set up with a voice provider, (4) the Twilio SIP trunk is pointed at Vapi and the phoneNumberId is recorded, and (5) the DNCL check function (check_dncl_status) has been replaced with a real CRTC lookup. See docs/architecture/OPERATIONS_HANDBOOK.md §14.3.

nodes.name: Manual Trigger (Webhook)
nodes.notes: Test entrypoint. POST { "lead_id": "..." } to dial one lead on demand (subject to DNCL and daily cap).

nodes.name: Check DNCL
nodes.notes: check_dncl_status is a PLACEHOLDER that always returns true. Replace the underlying SQL with a real CRTC DNCL lookup before activating this workflow for Canadian leads.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $json.lead_id || null, node_name: 'voice_preflight_skip', error_code: ($json.skip_reason === 'voice_dncl_blocked') ? 'VOICE_DNCL_BLOCKED' : 'VOICE_PREFLIGHT_SKIP', error_message: $json.skip_reason || 'unknown', created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ phoneNumberId: 'VAPI_PHONE_NUMBER_ID_PLACEHOLDER', customer: { number: $json.dial_phone }, assistant: { firstMessage: $json.first_message, model: { provider: 'anthropic', model: 'claude-haiku-4-5', temperature: 0.5 }, voice: { provider: '11labs', voiceId: 'rachel' } } }) }}

nodes.name: Vapi Dial
nodes.notes: TODO: (1) Add VAPI_API_KEY to .env. (2) Create n8n credential named exactly `Vapi` (HTTP Header Auth: header=`Authorization`, value=`Bearer {key}`). (3) Replace `VAPI_PHONE_NUMBER_ID_PLACEHOLDER` with the phoneNumberId Vapi issued for your Twilio number. (4) Bind this node to the Vapi credential. (5) In the Vapi dashboard, point the assistant's end-of-call webhook at the Manual Trigger URL of clx-voice-result-webhook-v1.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $json.id, client_id: $json.client_id || null, vapi_call_id: $json.vapi_call_id || null, call_outcome: $json.vapi_ok ? 'initiated' : 'failed', duration_sec: null, transcript: null, recording_url: null, cost_usd: 0, called_at: new Date().toISOString(), metadata: { dial_phone: $json.dial_phone, first_message: $json.first_message, error: $json.vapi_error || null } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $json.id, client_id: $json.client_id || null, channel: 'voice', channel_status: $json.vapi_ok ? 'initiated' : 'failed', subject: 'Voice outreach call', message_excerpt: ($json.first_message || '').slice(0, 200), provider_ref: $json.vapi_call_id || null, sent_at: new Date().toISOString(), metadata: { dial_phone: $json.dial_phone, error: $json.vapi_error || null } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Parse Vapi Response').first().json.id, node_name: 'vapi_call_failed', error_code: 'VOICE_CALL_FAILED', error_message: ($('Parse Vapi Response').first().json.vapi_error || 'unknown').toString().slice(0, 500), created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
